name: python3-ldb
title: python3-ldb
description:
Python 3 bindings for LDB
ldb is a LDAP-like embedded database built on top of TDB.
.
This package contains the Python 3 bindings for ldb.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ldb because Python 3 bindings for LDB.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ldb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ldb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ldb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
